mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", invoice_number as "invoiceNumber", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", customer_email as "customerEmail", total_amount as "totalAmount", tax_amount as "taxAmount", subtotal as "subtotal", shipping_amount as "shippingAmount", discount_amount as "discountAmount", status, gstin, billing_address as "billingAddress", shipping_address as "shippingAddress", created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.invoice_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT status as "status", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.invoice_flat GROUP BY status ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", invoice_number as "invoiceNumber", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", total_amount as "totalAmount", tax_amount as "taxAmount", status, created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.invoice_flat WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status = #{status} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", invoice_number as "invoiceNumber", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", total_amount as "totalAmount", tax_amount as "taxAmount", status, gstin, created_time as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.invoice_flat WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
